name: ViewSonic PX748-4K True 4K Home Projector
shortDescription: True 4K HDR visual experience, 4,000 ANSI Lumens, Direct Big-screen streaming via USB Type-C, 4.2ms Ultra-Fast Input & 240Hz high refresh rate, Warping, auto V keystone and 1.3x zoom, Home automation via LAN control and 12V trigger
description: The ViewSonic PX748-4K delivers a true 4K HDR gaming and home cinema experience with 4,000 ANSI Lumens of brightness for vivid images in any environment. Featuring 4.2ms ultra-fast input lag and 240Hz high refresh rate for buttery-smooth gaming. Direct big-screen streaming via USB Type-C, warping, auto vertical keystone and 1.3x optical zoom for flexible installation. Built-in home automation support via LAN control and 12V trigger makes it perfect for dedicated home theatre setups.

name: ViewSonic LS831WU Ultra Short Throw Laser Projector
shortDescription: 0.25 ultra short throw ratio, 2nd generation Laser Phosphor with 20,000 hours lifespan, 4,500 ANSI Lumens, 360° projection, Cost-effective built-in HDBaseT receiver
description: The ViewSonic LS831WU is a powerful ultra short throw laser projector with a 0.25 throw ratio for space-saving installation. Featuring 2nd generation Laser Phosphor technology delivering 4,500 ANSI Lumens of brightness and an impressive 20,000-hour lifespan. Supports 360° projection for creative installations, offers a larger screen size with lower cost-per-inch, and includes a cost-effective built-in HDBaseT receiver for streamlined AV connectivity.

name: ViewSonic LS920WU WUXGA Laser Projector
shortDescription: 6,000 ANSI Lumens, 2nd generation Laser Phosphor with 20,000 hours lifespan, Wide H/V lens shift and 1.6x optical zoom, 360° projection & Portrait mode, Built-in HDBaseT
description: The ViewSonic LS920WU is a high-brightness WUXGA laser projector delivering 6,000 ANSI Lumens for large venues and bright environments. Built on 2nd generation Laser Phosphor technology with a 20,000-hour lifespan for low-maintenance reliability. Offers wide horizontal and vertical lens shift and 1.6x optical zoom for flexible installation. Supports 360° projection and portrait mode, compact size, and built-in HDBaseT for streamlined connectivity.

name: ViewSonic PX701HD Full HD Projector
shortDescription: Energy-efficient SmartEco+ Mode, Vertical Lens Shift, vColorTuner, Customised User Modes, Dual HDMI inputs and USB power supply
description: The ViewSonic PX701HD is a versatile Full HD home and office projector designed for great image quality and energy efficiency. SmartEco+ Mode reduces power consumption while maintaining excellent brightness. Vertical lens shift allows for flexible placement, while vColorTuner and customised user modes let you fine-tune visuals to your preference. Dual HDMI inputs and USB power supply add convenience for a variety of setups.

name: ViewSonic X100-4K+ True 4K LED Home Projector
shortDescription: True 4K UHD, Cinema SuperColor+™ Technology with 125% Rec.709, 2nd generation LED with 30,000 hours lifespan, Wide H/V lens shift, 20 dB ultra-low fan noise, Instant power on
description: The ViewSonic X100-4K+ delivers a stunning true 4K UHD cinema experience at home. Cinema SuperColor+™ technology with 125% Rec.709 colour coverage ensures rich, lifelike colours. The 2nd generation LED light source lasts up to 30,000 hours with no lamp replacement needed. Wide horizontal and vertical lens shift offers flexible installation, while the extremely low 20 dB fan noise ensures a pure, immersive viewing experience. Instant power-on means you can enjoy your favourite films right away.

name: ViewSonic X1000-4K+ Ultra Short Throw 4K LED Projector
shortDescription: True 4K HDR, Ultra Short Throw 100" screen from 38cm, Cinema SuperColor+™ 125% Rec.709, 2nd generation LED 30,000 hours, 40W Integrated Harman Kardon soundbar, Smart streaming Wi-Fi/Bluetooth
description: The ViewSonic X1000-4K+ is an ultra short throw 4K LED smart projector that projects a 100-inch screen from just 38cm away. True 4K HDR visuals powered by Cinema SuperColor+™ Technology with 125% Rec.709 colour accuracy. The 2nd generation LED technology lasts 30,000 hours. Integrated 40W Harman Kardon soundbar delivers premium audio, while built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth enable smart streaming without additional devices.

name: ViewSonic LS750WU WUXGA Laser Projector
shortDescription: 5,000 ANSI Lumens, 2nd generation Laser Phosphor with 20,000 hours lifespan, 360° projection and 1.3x optical zoom, Cost-effective compact size
description: The ViewSonic LS750WU is a compact WUXGA laser projector delivering 5,000 ANSI Lumens of brightness for professional installations. Built on 2nd generation Laser Phosphor technology with a 20,000-hour lifespan for minimal maintenance. Supports 360° projection and offers 1.3x optical zoom for installation flexibility. The throw ratio matches existing installations for a hassle-free equipment upgrade.

name: ViewSonic X10-4K+ Smart 4K LED Short Throw Projector
shortDescription: 4K UHD LED Technology with 125% Rec.709, Built-in Harman Kardon Speakers, Smart Functionality + Voice Control, Bluetooth and Wi-Fi Connectivity, 0.8 Short Throw Ratio
description: The ViewSonic X10-4K+ is a smart 4K UHD short throw projector combining exceptional image quality with smart home convenience. Cinema SuperColor+™ LED technology with 125% Rec.709 delivers vivid, true-to-life colour. Built-in Harman Kardon speakers provide premium sound. Smart functionality with voice control, Bluetooth and Wi-Fi connectivity enable effortless streaming and smart home integration. The 0.8 short throw ratio makes it ideal for smaller rooms.

name: ViewSonic M1+ G2 Smart LED Portable Projector
shortDescription: Smart Wi-Fi & Bluetooth connectivity, 360° Smart stand with ceiling projection, Integrated Harman Kardon speakers, Cinema SuperColor+™ 125% Rec.709, 30,000-hour LED lifespan, Up to 6 hours battery
description: The ViewSonic M1+ G2 is a versatile smart LED portable projector with built-in Harman Kardon speakers and up to 6 hours of battery life. Smart Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity enable wireless streaming from your favourite apps. The innovative 360° smart stand allows for ceiling projection in any direction. Cinema SuperColor+™ Technology with 125% Rec.709 delivers vivid colours, and the advanced LED light source lasts up to 30,000 hours.

name: ViewSonic M2e Full HD Smart Portable Projector
shortDescription: Instant auto focus and auto keystone, Only 1kg portable design, Cinema SuperColor+™ Full HD, Harman Kardon speakers, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, USB Type-C, Virtually blue light free
description: The ViewSonic M2e is an ultra-portable Full HD smart projector weighing just 1kg — small enough to fit in a handbag or backpack. Features instant auto focus and auto keystone for effortless setup anywhere. Cinema SuperColor+™ delivers engaging Full HD visuals, while integrated Harman Kardon speakers provide exceptional audio. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth and USB Type-C offer expanded connectivity, and the virtually blue-light-free display ensures comfortable viewing.

name: ViewSonic myViewBoard Direct VBD100
shortDescription: Extend screen to interactive whiteboard via HDMI, annotation and multimedia import tools, screen capture and recording, wireless screen sharing via myViewBoard canvas
description: ViewSonic myViewBoard Direct VBD100 allows a presenter to extend their screen image to a whiteboarding environment on any PC-based digital whiteboard. Over HDMI connection, users can instantly show videos on a large interactive display while having rich whiteboarding tools such as annotation, multimedia import, and screen capture and recording for engaging interaction. myViewBoard Direct provides mobile PC users with easy screen sharing on the myViewBoard canvas.

name: ViewSonic VB-AUD-201 Conference Speakerphone
shortDescription: 360° omnidirectional 6m coverage, 4 array microphones with echo cancellation & noise reduction, 340g portable, 24-hour call time, USB Type-C and Bluetooth 5.0, Mobile charger function
description: The ViewSonic VB-AUD-201 conference speakerphone is the perfect product for frequent online meetings at home or in the office. Premium conversation quality with 360° omnidirectional coverage up to 6 metres in diameter. Four array microphones with echo cancellation and noise reduction ensure every word is clearly heard. Lightweight at just 340g with 24-hour call time for meetings on the go. Can also serve as a mobile charger. USB Type-C port and Bluetooth 5.0 provide hassle-free connectivity.

name: ViewSonic VB-VIS-002 Document & Webcam
shortDescription: 8MP autofocus camera with 8x digital zoom, scan/record/livestream up to A3 materials, real-time annotation, USB connectivity, lightweight and portable
description: The ViewSonic VB-VIS-002 is a document and web camera built for more immersive, engaging lessons and presentations. Demonstrate and display physical teaching materials in detail effortlessly with an 8-megapixel autofocus camera and 8x digital zoom. Scan, record or livestream worksheets, textbooks and even 3D models of up to A3 in size, and annotate on them in real time. The lightweight and portable VB-VIS-002 connects to a laptop or large touchscreen display via USB for interactive collaboration.

name: ViewSonic VB-CAM-201 AI Conference Camera
shortDescription: AI voice tracking auto-framing, 121° wide-angle FOV, 4K UHD resolution, 5x digital zoom, 4 array microphones with AEC/ANS/AGC audio processing, multiple mounting options
description: The ViewSonic VB-CAM-201 is a smart AI conference camera that automatically focuses framing on the narrator during conferences through voice tracking. Automatically adjusts the frame based on attendees' seating with up to 121° wide-angle field of view. 4K UHD resolution with 5x digital zoom ensures sharp, detailed video. Multiple mounting options fit all meeting room setups. Includes stereo speaker and 4 array microphones with 3A audio processing — Acoustic Echo Cancellation (AEC), Automatic Noise Suppression (ANS), and Automatic Gain Control (AGC).

name: ViewSonic VB-CAM-001 Full HD Webcam
shortDescription: Built-in stereo microphone with automatic noise reduction, light correction and backlight compensation, multi-purpose bracket, Compatible with Windows/Mac/Android/Chrome OS
description: The ViewSonic VB-CAM-001 is a versatile Full HD webcam designed for seamless video conferencing and online collaboration. Built-in stereo microphone with automatic noise reduction ensures clear audio. Light correction technology and backlight compensation deliver optimal image quality in any lighting condition. The multi-purpose bracket design allows easy installation in various setups. Compatible with Windows, Mac, Android, and Chrome OS for broad device support.

name: ViewSonic VB-CAM-002 Full HD Webcam with Privacy Cover
shortDescription: Full HD 1080p, Built-in lens privacy cover, Stereo microphone with automatic noise reduction, Compatible with Windows/Mac/Android/Chrome OS, All-round design for easy installation
description: The ViewSonic VB-CAM-002 is a Full HD 1080p webcam featuring a built-in lens cover for complete privacy when not in use. Crystal clear video quality from Full HD resolution, combined with an all-round design for easy installation and clean cable management. Built-in stereo microphone with automatic noise reduction ensures clear communication. Compatible with Windows, Mac, Android, and Chrome OS for universal device support.

name: ViewSonic VB-WPS-003 Wireless Presentation System
shortDescription: Wireless content sharing with a click, USB-C or HDMI connectivity, Secure data protection, Multi-device collaboration, Compatible with Windows, Mac and Chrome OS
description: The ViewSonic VB-WPS-003 wireless presentation system enables instant, one-click content sharing to a display from any device. Secure data safeguarding ensures your presentations are protected. Uninterrupted connectivity via USB-C or HDMI and the ability to collaborate across multiple devices simultaneously. Compatible with Windows, Mac and Chrome OS for maximum flexibility in any meeting room.

name: ViewSonic VB-WPS-001 Wireless Presentation System
shortDescription: Wireless content sharing with a click, USB-C or HDMI connectivity, Secure data protection, Multi-device collaboration, Compatible with Windows, Mac and Chrome OS
description: The ViewSonic VB-WPS-001 wireless presentation system enables instant, one-click content sharing to a display. Secure and safeguard your data with built-in protection. Uninterrupted connectivity via USB-C or HDMI, with the ability to collaborate across multiple devices instantly. Compatible with Windows, Mac and Chrome OS for seamless use in any meeting or classroom environment.

name: ViewSonic VPC12-WPO-11 Slot-in PC
shortDescription: Intel Core i5-7200U with vPro and TPM, Intel HD Graphic 620, 64GB Total Available Graphics Memory, Max Resolution 4096x2304@60Hz, Windows 10 Pro
description: The ViewSonic VPC12-WPO-11 is a slot-in PC designed for ViewBoard interactive displays. Powered by Intel Core i5-7200U with vPro and TPM for enterprise security and manageability. Intel HD Graphic 620 supports up to 64GB total available graphics memory and a maximum resolution of 4096x2304 at 60Hz. Runs Windows 10 Pro for full compatibility with professional applications and IT infrastructure.

name: ViewSonic VPC27-W53-O1-1B Slot-in PC
shortDescription: Ideal for ViewBoard Interactive & Commercial Displays, Powerful Intel 10th Gen Core Processors, Improved System Stability, Security & Thermal Control
description: The ViewSonic VPC27-W53-O1-1B is a powerful slot-in PC built for seamless integration with ViewBoard interactive displays and commercial displays. Powered by Intel 10th Generation Core processors for high-performance computing. Improved system stability, security and thermal control ensure reliable long-term operation in demanding professional environments.

name: ViewSonic VSB050 USB Wireless Adapter
shortDescription: USB Wireless Adapter for ViewSonic displays and collaboration devices
description: The ViewSonic VSB050 is a USB wireless adapter designed to add or enhance wireless connectivity for ViewSonic displays and collaboration devices. A simple plug-and-play accessory for seamless wireless integration in meeting rooms and classrooms.

name: ViewSonic VPC27-S53-01-1B Slot-in PC
shortDescription: Slot-in PC for ViewBoard, Intel 10th Gen Core Processors, 16GB DDR4 memory, Improved System Stability, Security & Thermal Control
description: The ViewSonic VPC27-S53-01-1B is a high-performance slot-in PC for ViewBoard interactive displays. Powered by Intel 10th Generation Core processors with 16GB DDR4 memory for smooth, responsive performance. Delivers improved system stability, security and thermal control for reliable all-day operation in professional settings.

name: ViewSonic VPC12-WPO-16 Slot-in PC
shortDescription: Intel Core i5-8259U, High Definition Audio Stereo, Intel HD Graphic 655, Max Resolution 4096x2304@60Hz, Windows 10 Pro
description: The ViewSonic VPC12-WPO-16 is a slot-in PC for ViewBoard interactive displays, featuring the Intel Core i5-8259U processor and Intel HD Graphic 655. Supports a maximum resolution of 4096x2304 at 60Hz for crisp, ultra-high-resolution output. High Definition Audio Stereo provides clear sound output. Runs Windows 10 Pro for full enterprise compatibility.

name: CZUR StarryHub Q1S Pro All-in-One Conference System
shortDescription: All-in-One Conference System, 4K Ultra HD Camera, 120° Wide Angle View, AI Speaker Tracking, 2400 ANSI DLP Projector, 6-Mic 360° Audio Pickup, Wireless Screen Sharing, Android-Powered StarryOS
description: The CZUR StarryHub Q1S Pro is an all-in-one conference and presentation system that combines a 2400 ANSI DLP projector, 4K Ultra HD camera, and 360° audio into a single device. The 120° wide-angle view and AI speaker tracking automatically keep the active speaker in frame. Six built-in microphones with 360° audio pickup ensure everyone in the room is heard clearly. Wireless screen sharing and Android-powered StarryOS make collaboration effortless, eliminating the need for multiple separate devices.
